title: Exploration Additions
description: A client side modpack consisting of mods and resource packs to make your exploration better.
body:
![Banner Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42eb86d5220c4c1a5db6e287e9c050ece383eb6b.png)

### Client Side!
Most of the mods on the modpack don't add new content to the game, meaning you will be able to use the modpack on any server
_Some mods like Voice Chat, and Axiom either require additional software on the server or only work in singleplayer._

### Lost on your exploration?
Use our map mods to find your way back! Place waypoints in your world or look at your surroundings.

### Want an immersive experience with your friends?
On supported servers you can use proximity chat while you ask your friend for diamonds!

### Have an unorganized chest system?
Easily type in what you are looking for and figure out what chest your emeralds are in!

### Want better lighting, but still want it to look like Minecraft?
With our built in shaders you can make Minecraft look just a little bit better!

<details>
<summary>Keybinds</summary>

- [C] Zoom
- [M] Map
- [Caps Lock] Fast Zoom
- [R] Reload Shaders
- [K] Toggle Shaders
- [Del] Open Litematica Menu
- [Del + R] Toggle Schematic Rendering
- [Del + 0] Toggle Easy Place for Schematics
- [Alt + Click] (In inventory) Lock Item

</details>

_Shows as discord status._

**_NOTE:_** _Some mods may be bannable on servers. Please ask administators or use at your own risk._
